headline: Strategic angle — First-mover advantage in pivoting to renewables or proactive ESG disclosure.
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, CDP, GRI triggered; non-disclosure or poor scores may attract SEBI scrutiny and penalties.
ESG score gap widens versus peers with higher renewables mix; risk of index exclusion grows.
Potential negative impact on talent attraction and community perception due to fossil fuel focus.
